---
title: "Historical Ballads Arranged to meet the New Code of 1882, Schedule II, English."
---

## Historical Ballads Arranged to meet the New Code of 1882, Schedule II, English.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction: critical anthology
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

### Notes

This seems to have been a work in three parts of which the first two were entitled Historical Ballads, and the third (aimed at older children) Historical Poetry.
Historical Ballads: Part I., for Standards II. and III
Historical Ballads: Part II., for Standards IV. and V.
Historical Poetry: Part III, for Standards VI. and VII edited and annotated by Charlotte M. Yonge, author of \'Cameos from English history\', \\""The heir of Redclyffe\', &c.; arranged to meet the New Code of 1882, Schedule II., English.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
